@startuml
left to right direction
actor "Actor" as Actor
participant "LoginController" as LoginController
participant "Md5Util" as Md5Util
participant "ISysUserService" as ISysUserService
participant "PasswordUtil" as PasswordUtil
participant "JwtUtil" as JwtUtil

LoginController -> Md5Util : md5Encode
activate Md5Util
